control_description: All user accounts, including privileged accounts, are required to use multi-factor authentication (MFA). MFA is enforced via identity provider and applies to VPN, cloud applications, and internal systems.
Quarterly review of user access rights is performed by application owners to ensure appropriateness of access. Inactive or unauthorized accounts are revoked based on review findings.
All privileged user activities are logged and monitored. Security Operations reviews logs weekly to detect unauthorized or suspicious activities.
Critical security patches are applied to systems within 7 days of release. Patch status is tracked and reported through centralized patch management tools.
Automated daily backups of critical databases are performed and stored securely. Restoration tests are conducted quarterly to validate backup integrity.
